predicates.name: possesses_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person possesses Belgian nationality (or provides proof thereof). A background status that case texts may directly assert.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying Community free movement rights.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The alien is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The alien meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: has_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The alien has an illegal stay: present on the territory without meeting entry or stay conditions.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
predicates.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country of origin. A background status that case texts may directly assert.

predicates.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien is an identified alien under one of the three statutory identification criteria.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the alien's circumstances has been performed.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the alien is current and real.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien, established following individual examination and based on one or more objective criteria.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: Criterion 1: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay.

predicates.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
predicates.description: The person did not make an application for international protection within the time limit provided by the Act.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: Criterion 2: the person used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: Criterion 3: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: Criterion 4: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer measure, refusal of entry measure, or removal measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure less coercive than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_public_order_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to those in criterion 4 subpoints a-d.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: Criterion 5: the person is the subject of an active entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: Criterion 6: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative decision, termination of stay, or removal measure.

predicates.name: new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: Criterion 7: the person concealed having already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: Criterion 8: the person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, and those applications gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: Criterion 9: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_application_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: Criterion 10: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application
predicates.description: The person declared, or it appears from the person's file, that the person came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which the person submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: Criterion 11: the person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because the person submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the eleven objective absconding criteria is met for the person.
